_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.
_publications._context: The HEI-193, an HPV E6-E7 immortalized schwannoma cell line, was a kind gift from Dr. Weg M. Ongkeko | immortalized human schwannoma cell line, HEI-193, established from an neurofibromatosis type 2 patient, has been stably transduced with fluorescent protein and luciferase reporters | HEI-193 schwannoma (RRID:CVCL_7660) and murine (MS03 schwannoma) cell lines were generated as previously described

_publications._publicationTitle: A novel imaging-compatible sciatic nerve schwannoma model.
Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.
